scripts.test: npm run test:mines && npm run test:snake && npm run test:abyss
scripts.test:snake: node games/snake/tests/test-prng.js && node games/snake/tests/test-core.js && node games/snake/tests/test-fruits.js && node games/snake/tests/test-ai.js && node games/snake/tests/test-storage.js && node games/snake/tests/test-achievements.js && node games/snake/tests/test-gallery.js
scripts.test:abyss: node games/abyssshoot/tests/test-tiles.js && node games/abyssshoot/tests/test-core.js && node games/abyssshoot/tests/test-anim.js && node games/abyssshoot/tests/test-sim.js
